title: 有馬記念の後に・レースに勝って……

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon conquers the Arima Kinen. Alas, the
audience only has eyes for the Beast—Narita
Brian's run was simply incredible.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon's won the race, but lost the
one-on-one. She vows to get a proper rematch
with Narita Brian at the Arima Kinen next year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After talking it over, we decide to set the Osaka
Hai for our next goal, and it's going to be first
place or bust!
